$comment: Curation rules applied after extracting raw anatomy data from S2 docs. Documents why the registry diverges from the source markdown. Re-run the extraction script to apply.

removals.background: This is a token object / styling surface (belongs in the 'object' field of the name object, not 'anatomy'). See token-objects.json.

action-button-1.reason: Numbering artifact from action-group diagram; normalize to the component name.

action-button-2.reason: Numbering artifact from action-group diagram; normalize to the component name.

body-area.reason: Redundant '-area' suffix; aligns with existing anatomy-terms registry term 'body'.

header-area.reason: Redundant '-area' suffix; aligns with existing anatomy-terms registry term 'header'.

footer-area.reason: Redundant '-area' suffix; aligns with existing anatomy-terms registry term 'footer'.

small-divider.reason: Size qualifier is not an anatomy distinction; aligns with existing anatomy-terms registry term 'divider'.

accordion.note: Component used as a named part in standard-panel (spec anatomy tier 2).

action-button.note: Component used as a named part in action-group and contextual-help.

button.note: Component used as a named part in alert-banner, coach-mark, drop-zone, illustrated-message.

button-group.note: Component used as a named part in alert-dialog, coach-mark, standard-dialog, takeover-dialog.

calendar.note: Component used as a named part in date-picker.

checkbox.note: Component used as a named part in cards, list-view, menu, select-box, table, tree-view.

close-button.note: Component used as a named part in alert-banner, coach-mark, standard-dialog, takeover-dialog, toast, in-line-alert.

field-label.note: Component used as a named part in combo-box, date-picker, radio-group, slider.

help-text.note: Component used as a named part in combo-box, number-field, picker, search-field, text-area, text-field, checkbox-group, radio-group.

link.note: Component used as a named part in contextual-help.

popover.note: Component used as a named part in contextual-help, menu.

swatch.note: Component used as a named part in swatch-group.

switch.note: Component used as a named part in menu.

tag.note: Component used as a named part in tag-field, tag-group.

text-area.note: Component used as a named part in tag-field.

avatar.note: Component used as a named part in avatar-group, list-view, tag.

thumbnail.note: Component used as a named part in list-view, menu.
